description: Analyze the layer_0 sub_layers directory structure. This is an ORCHESTRATOR task - you must decompose it into subtasks and spawn child agents.

subtasks.description: Analyze sub_layer_0_01_ai_system: count files, identify key components, summarize purpose
Analyze sub_layer_0_02_context_agents: count files, identify agents, summarize purpose
Analyze sub_layer_0_05_rules: count rule files, list rule names, summarize governance

expectedOutcome.format: summary of all 3 sub_layers with file counts and purposes
